blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Requires authenticated cursor-agent for end-to-end tool call testing. cursor-agent is installed but not authenticated - `cursor-agent models` returns 'No models available for this account'. Code implementation verified via unit tests (28 tool-loop tests pass) and code inspection (createToolCallCompletionResponse, createToolCallStreamChunks functions in src/proxy/tool-loop.ts).

Requires authenticated cursor-agent to trigger tool calls and test loop guard. Same auth issue as VAL-TOOL-001. Code implementation verified via unit tests (43 tool-loop-guard tests pass) and code inspection (createToolLoopGuard() with maxRepeat=2, exploration tools get 5x multiplier = 10).

Requires MCP servers configured in opencode.json to test schema normalization. No MCP servers are currently configured. Code implementation verified via unit tests (20 schema-compat tests pass) and code inspection (applyToolSchemaCompat() in tool-schema-compat.ts, mcpSchemaToZod() in mcp/tool-bridge.ts).

Requires MCP servers configured in opencode.json AND authenticated cursor-agent. Neither is available. Code implementation verified via code inspection (buildMcpToolHookEntries and buildMcpToolDefinitions in mcp/tool-bridge.ts with proper mcp__serverName__toolName namespacing).

notes.cursorAgentStatus: Installed but not authenticated - `cursor-agent models` returns 'No models available for this account'
notes.authFilesFound: cli-config.json exists in ~/.cursor/ but only contains user settings (model preferences, vim mode, etc.), NOT access tokens. Tokens are stored internally by cursor-agent.
notes.unitTestsStatus: All 71 unit tests pass (28 tool-loop + 43 tool-loop-guard/schema-compat)
notes.proxyServerStatus: Proxy starts successfully on port 32124, /health returns {"status":"ok","auth":"not_authenticated"}

conclusion: All 4 tool-support assertions are blocked by environmental constraints. The code implementations are verified via unit tests and code inspection, but cannot be tested end-to-end without authenticated cursor-agent and configured MCP servers.
